creator: mitya@cabletv.dp.ua
text:
Cairo-Dock has crashed on FreeBSD 8.0-STABLE amd64 and xorg 1.7.5

%cairo-dock
warning :  (cairo-dock-draw-opengl.c:cairo_dock_get_opengl_config:1693)  
  couldn't find an appropriate visual, trying to get one without Stencil buffer
(it may cause some little deterioration in the rendering) ...
warning :  (cairo-dock-draw-opengl.c:cairo_dock_get_opengl_config:1707)  
  still couldn't find an appropriate visual ourself, trying something else, this may not work with some drivers ...
gtk_widget_get_gl_context: assertion `GTK_IS_WIDGET (widget)' failed
IRQ's not enabled, falling back to busy waits: 2 0
warning : (cairo-dock-config.c:cairo_dock_get_boolean_key_value:96) 
  Файл ключей не содержит ключ «lock all»
gmem.c:137: failed to allocate 187644257854905 bytes
warning : (cairo-dock.c:_cairo_dock_intercept_signal:193)

** (process:75724): WARNING (recursed) **: Cairo-Dock has crashed (sig 6).
It will be restarted now.
Feel free to report this bug on cairo-dock.org to help improving the dock !
aborting...
Segmentation fault (core dumped)

How-To-Repeat: run cairo-dock again
